name: Bestial Spirit (Land)
ac_note: 11 + the level of the spell slot used
hp_formula: Air/Water 30, Land 40, +5 per spell level above 2nd

traits.name: Mood
traits.desc: Choose Air (fly 60 ft., Flyby), Land (this block; climb 40 ft.), or Water (swim 60 ft.) when you cast the spell.

traits.name: Shared Proficiency
traits.desc: The beast uses your proficiency bonus for its attacks and any checks it makes.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The beast makes a number of attacks equal to half this spell's level (rounded down), minimum one.

description: A bestial spirit conjured by the Summon Beast spell. Its numbers scale with the slot used; pick a mood (Air/Land/Water) each casting.

name: Familiar (Owl)
languages: understands the languages you speak, but can't speak

traits.name: Flyby
traits.desc: The familiar doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

traits.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
traits.desc: Advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing or sight.

traits.name: Familiar Bond
traits.desc: Telepathic link within 100 ft.; you can see through its senses as an action, and it can deliver your touch spells.

description: A spirit summoned by Find Familiar, shown here in its owl form. Swap the stats for any of the spell's listed forms (bat, cat, hawk, rat, raven, etc.).

name: Spiritual Weapon
ac_note: no hit points; cannot be attacked or damaged

traits.name: Floating Weapon
traits.desc: A spectral weapon you move up to 20 ft. and attack with as a bonus action on each of your turns. It requires no concentration.

actions.name: Force Blade
actions.desc: Damage increases by 1d8 for every two spell slot levels above 2nd.

description: A floating spectral weapon. It has no hit points and can't be targeted; delete the HP tracker or leave it as a marker.

name: Flaming Sphere
ac_note: no hit points; cannot be attacked or damaged

traits.name: Fiery Body
traits.desc: A creature that ends its turn within 5 ft. of the sphere makes a Dexterity save, taking 2d6 fire damage on a failure or half as much on a success.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.desc: Sheds bright light in a 20-ft. radius and dim light for an additional 20 ft.

actions.name: Ram (Bonus Action)
actions.desc: As a bonus action you move the sphere up to 30 ft.; if it rams a creature, that creature makes a Dexterity save. Damage increases by 1d6 per spell slot level above 2nd.

description: A 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire you move as a bonus action. It has no hit points; leave the tracker as a marker.

name: Wolf

traits.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
traits.desc: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 ft. of it and isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

description: A standard wolf, a common pick for Conjure Animals. Cast at 3rd level you summon multiples — spawn the quantity you rolled and track each independently.
